prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "create_work_order",
        "arguments": {
          "fault_type": "preventive inspection",
          "estimated_downtime_hours": 8,
          "priority": "low",
          "issue_description": "Preventive maintenance for transformer T-013",
          "transformer_id": "T-013"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-9622c428121c1821",
        "output": {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-727C9062\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive maintenance for transformer T-013\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"preventive inspection\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 8.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T07:44:21.061993Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}"
        }
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The create_work_order function was called with the required parameters, including the transformer ID, issue description, priority, fault type, and estimated downtime. The function returned a work order ID, which can be used to update the work order status, assign a technician, and add notes. The work order is currently in the \"open\" status, awaiting assignment and completion.",
    "tool_calls": []
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The create_work_order function was called with the required parameters, including the transformer ID, issue description, priority, fault type, and estimated downtime. The function returned a work order ID, which can be used to update the work order status, assign a technician, and add notes. The work order is currently in the "open" status, awaiting assignment and completion.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "The agent should directly output the structured work order as requested in the task."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent should directly output the structured work order as requested in the task.
